pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies creating two styles with these exact names
Task description explicitly specifies editing the 'ne:ne_countries' layer. Layer is created from Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset imported into GeoServer.
Task description specifies exact color values for population_classes style. These colors match the standard ColorBrewer BuGn (Blue-Green) 5-class sequential palette.
Task description specifies exact color values for economy_types style (7 classes). These colors match standard ColorBrewer palettes with blues and oranges for categorical visualization.
Task description specifies '~/output/map_population.png' and '~/output/map_economy.png', which expands to /home/ga/output/ for user 'ga'.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real geospatial data from Natural Earth (ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset). The task requires creating two SLD styles named 'population_classes' and 'economy_types' for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer in GeoServer. The population_classes style uses the ColorBrewer BuGn 5-class palette (#c7e9b4, #7fcdbb, #41b6c4, #2c7fb8, #253494) to classify countries by population estimates (pop_est attribute) into five ranges: <10M, 10M-50M, 50M-100M, 100M-500M, >=500M. The economy_types style uses a 7-color categorical palette (#08519c, #3182bd, #e6550d, #fd8d3c, #fee391, #fcbba1, #d9d9d9) to classify countries by economy type (economy attribute) starting with digits 1-7. Output images must be saved to /home/ga/output/map_population.png and /home/ga/output/map_economy.png.
